The relationship with our father is one of the most important relationships we will have in our lives. In this film, you will meet a couple who had two very different relationships with their fathers and yet the ways they had organized their lives around their fathers were very similar. Georgia's father had died when she was six years old and she had construed a story of the life of suffering because of his death. Robert had a father whose love he craved and he had construed a story of being the victim of a domineering father who put him down. You will see how Tony changes these stories and in so doing elevates the couple to where they are able to connect with a deep bond of love and passion.
